title: Ubiquiti UniFi switch USW-Ultra-60W
description: A compact, 8-port, Layer 2 GbE PoE switch with versatile mounting options. The switch has 1 PoE in port and 7 PoE out ports with PoE 802.3af/at with max wattage 30W per port. Switch is managed by UniFi network providing central management and cloud access Max PoE budget depend on method how switch is powered: 60W PoE++ input: 45W DC adapter input: 52W Passive PoE adapter input: 45W 60W PoE++ input: 45W DC adapter input: 52W Passive PoE adapter input: 45W switch power adapter 54V/1,1A mount kit
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power type DC connector, PoE PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 7 PoE budget [W] 52 Max. power consumption [W] 60 Power via connector/terminal 44 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 15 up to 45 Width [mm] 203 Height [mm] 33 Depth [mm] 76 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 8
